results.definition_en: A thick liquid from plants, animals, or the earth, used for food or fuel.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 油;可食或可燃之黏稠液體，來自植物、動物或地下。
results.example_en: Pour some oil into the pan.

results.definition_en: The act of doing or running a thing, especially a careful work.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 運作、操作；執行某事的過程，特指細緻工作。
results.example_en: The operation of the machine is simple.
results.example_zh_tw: 這台機器的操作很簡單。

results.definition_en: What a person thinks about a thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 意見、看法；某人對事物的想法。
results.example_en: In my opinion, the book is great.

results.definition_en: The way things are put in a row; or a word telling one what to do.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 順序、命令；事物排列的方式或下達的指令。
results.example_en: Put the books in order on the shelf.

results.definition_en: A group of people working together for one aim.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 組織、機構；為共同目標合作的團體。
results.example_en: She works for a small organization.

results.definition_en: A small thing used to make a place look pretty.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 裝飾品、飾物；使環境美觀的小物。
results.example_en: She put an ornament on the table.
results.example_zh_tw: 她在桌上擺了個裝飾品。

results.definition_en: The person to whom a thing belongs.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 擁有者、所有者；事物所屬的人。
results.example_en: Who is the owner of this house?

results.definition_en: One side of a sheet in a book or paper.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 頁、頁面；書或紙的一面。
results.example_en: Turn to page ten.

results.definition_en: A bad feeling in the body or mind.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 疼痛、痛苦；身體或心理的不適感。
results.example_en: She felt a sharp pain in her arm.

results.definition_en: A coloured liquid put on a thing to cover it.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 油漆、顏料；可塗於物體表面的有色液體。
results.example_en: She put new paint on the door.

results.definition_en: A thin flat material made from wood, used for writing or wrapping.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 紙、紙張；以木材製成、用以書寫或包裝的薄片。
results.example_en: Write your name on the paper.

results.definition_en: One of the pieces that make up a whole.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 部分、零件；構成整體的單元。
results.example_en: This is the best part of the story.
results.example_zh_tw: 這是故事最精彩的部分。

results.definition_en: A soft sticky mix used to keep one thing on another.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 糊狀物、漿糊；柔軟黏稠、可使物相連之物。
results.example_en: Use a little paste to fix the picture.

results.definition_en: Money given for a thing one has got.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 付款、款項；為所得之物所付的錢。
results.example_en: The payment is due next week.

results.definition_en: A state with no fighting or trouble.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 和平、安寧；無爭鬥與煩擾的狀態。
results.example_en: We live in peace with our friends.

results.definition_en: A man, woman, or child.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 人、個人；指任一男女老幼。
results.example_en: There is one person in the room.

results.definition_en: A part of space where a thing or person is.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 地方、位置；人或事物所在的空間。
results.example_en: Put it back in its place.

results.definition_en: A living thing that grows in the earth, like a tree or flower.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 植物；生長於土壤的生物，如樹或花。
results.example_en: I have a small plant by the window.
results.example_zh_tw: 我窗邊放了一株小植物。

results.definition_en: An act done for fun; or a story acted out on a stage.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 遊戲、玩耍；或舞台上演出的劇。
results.example_en: We went to see a play last night.
results.example_zh_tw: 我們昨晚去看了一齣戲。

results.definition_en: A feeling of being happy and at ease.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 愉悅、樂趣；快樂且放鬆的感受。
results.example_en: It was a great pleasure to see her.

results.definition_en: A sharp end; or a place in space or time.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 尖端;或時空中的某一處。
results.example_en: The point of the pencil is broken.

results.definition_en: A thing that makes one ill or dead if taken in.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 毒、毒物；攝入後致病或致死之物。
results.example_en: The bottle had poison in it.

results.definition_en: A soft stuff put on a thing to make it shine.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 亮光劑、拋光劑；使物發亮的塗劑。
results.example_en: She put polish on her shoes.

results.definition_en: A person whose work is to carry bags or to keep the door.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 搬運工、門房；負責搬運或看門之人。
results.example_en: The porter helped with my bags.

results.definition_en: The place where a thing is, or the way it stands.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 位置、姿勢；事物所處之地或所立之態。
results.example_en: Take your position by the door.
